remarks: Welcome to this sun-filled, move-in-ready 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath townhouse in the highly desirable Green Oaks community! Offering an open and inviting floor plan, freshly painted throughout, this home seamlessly connects the living, dining, and kitchen areas, all enhanced by gleaming hardwood floors.  The kitchen features brand new stainless steel dishwasher and hood, and ample workspace, making it ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The spacious living and dining area opens through sliding glass doors to an oversized private deck-perfect for outdoor dining, relaxing, or hosting guests.  Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms and a full bathroom, while the half bath conveniently completes the main level.  The finished lower level provides flexible bonus space, perfect for a family room, home office, gym, or playroom, along with an in-unit laundry area. An attached one-car garage with direct interior access and 2 additional assigned parking spaces add to the home's convenience.  Enjoy the beautifully maintained, park-like setting of Green Oaks, complete with a fenced-in community pool, all tucked away on a quiet street. Ideally located within walking distance to shopping, restaurants, grocery stores, and Home Depot, and just minutes from Old Greenwich, downtown Stamford, Metro-North, I-95, and everything the area has to offer.  This turnkey townhouse combines comfort, style, and an unbeatable location-don't miss the opportunity to make it your
